title: Entry-Level Instructional Designer at Extramarks Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Instructional Designer at Extramarks Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Instructional Designer looking for your next big career move? Extramarks Holdings Services in Ghaziabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Extramarks Holdings Services:
Extramarks Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Extramarks Holdings Services!
